summary: Comprehensive testing of Satta Matka betting app completed successfully. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are working excellently with 95%+ success rate.

minor_issues.issue: Backend uses MongoDB ObjectId which is not JSON serializable
minor_issues.impact: Potential serialization issues in future development
minor_issues.recommendation: Consider using UUIDs instead of ObjectId for better JSON compatibility

design_issues.issue: Console shows 401 errors on initial load and after logout
design_issues.impact: Minor - doesn't affect functionality but shows in browser console

passed_tests: Admin login with JWT httpOnly cookies
Dashboard showing all 6 games (Delhi Bazaar, Shri Ganesh, Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Gali, Disawar)
Game page betting functionality (single numbers 0-9 and jodi 00-99)
Admin panel with result declaration form
Admin panel user and withdrawal management
All data-testid attributes present for testing
